recommendations.title: Requirements to Be a Normal Person
recommendations.overview: Maria is 30 years old, she is a peculiar person and has one goal: become a normal person. But first of all she must discover what is exactly this. Which kind of person is she? Is she a normal person? What does exactly means? That question goes deeper

recommendations.title: Cria!
recommendations.overview: Ana, an eight-year-old girl living in Madrid with her grandmother and two sisters, mourns the death of her mother.

recommendations.title: The Returned
recommendations.overview: In a post-zombie world, where the infected live normal lives, their retroviral drug is running out.

recommendations.title: The Lives of Others
recommendations.overview: In 1984 East Berlin, dedicated Stasi officer Gerd Wiesler begins spying on a famous playwright and his actress-lover Christa-Maria. Wiesler becomes unexpectedly sympathetic to the couple, and faces conflicting loyalties when his superior takes a liki

recommendations.title: Johnny Stecchino
recommendations.overview: Good hearted but not very wordly-wise, Dante is happy driving the school bus for a group of mentally handicapped children, while feeling he is somehow missing out on life and love. So he is very excited when after nearly being knocked down by her car

recommendations.title: The Poker House
recommendations.overview: Agnes and her two sisters struggle through a day in a home overrun by gamblers, thieves, and johns.

recommendations.title: Mustang
recommendations.overview: In a Turkish village, five orphaned sisters live under strict rule while members of their family prepare their arranged marriages.

recommendations.title: His Three Daughters
recommendations.overview: Emotions run high when three estranged sisters reunite in a cramped New York City apartment to watch over their ailing father during his final days.

recommendations.title: White Material
